The repeal of roe v wade was a very bad thing that marked the beginning of a serious threat to American democracy

Many people attempt to frame it as being merely an issue of the [[ethics of abortion]] when in reality the bigger issues revolve around democracy and civil rights

[[Category:Politics]]
[[Category:2022]][[Category:Old pages]][[Category:Old pages]][[Category:Old pages]][[Category:Old pages]][[Category:Old pages]]
[[Category:Oldest pages before the refresh]]
[[Category:Pages]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
